title: 30 second next episode previews
wikitext:
[]: 30 second next episode previews             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Feb 20, 2006 5:49 pm I'm looking for the subs, or at least what the subs say on Perfect Collection or Platinum, for the 30 second next episode preview for episodes #21 to #24. I have those unsubbed and would like to complete. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 20, 2006 11:38 pm Will do. You'll probably want both, I think the Platinum and Perfect have different length previews. I'll put some work into it tommorow.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Feb 20, 2006 11:42 pm Thanks a lot!!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 21, 2006 4:16 pm Platinum 21 - ON AIR Asuka falls into a pyschological pifall due to having lost to Shinji. Furthermore, the psychological attack from an Angel delivers the finishing blow to Asuka's mind. Shinji is unable to offer her any words of comfort. Next time, "At Least, Be Human"

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Tue Feb 21, 2006 4:57 pm y'know, reading that makes me want to watch it again.^^

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sat Jul 01, 2006 6:27 am darth_mark wrote: y'know, reading that makes me want to watch it again.^^
